prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of an adult Japanese woman in her 20s on a beach in early summer morning, standing casually near the shoreline. She has damp dark brown hair tied loosely back with messy wet bangs framing her face, natural makeup, soft glossy moisture on her skin, a calm and slightly dreamy expression, looking slightly upward toward the camera. She wears an oversized white button-up shirt, slightly damp and lightly clinging to the body, sleeves rolled up to the elbows, the front tied in a knot above the waist, open collar, with a modest inner camisole visible underneath. She also wears blue denim short shorts with rolled hems, casual summer styling, relaxed and realistic fit. One hand lightly touches the shirt near the chest, the other arm relaxed naturally by her side or lightly resting near her thigh. One leg is slightly bent for a natural, relaxed pose. Background: open sandy beach in the early morning, gentle shoreline, soft waves, wet sand reflecting light, clear summer atmosphere, distant horizon, minimal people, airy and quiet seaside mood. Small highlights of water droplets on the legs and shirt suggest recent contact with sea spray or morning moisture. Composition: vertical portrait, full-body to three-quarter framing, subject slightly off-center, camera at about chest height, shallow depth of field, horizon softly blurred, natural posture, elegant but casual beach portrait. Lighting: strong summer morning sunlight from behind the subject, beautiful backlighting / rim light around the hair and shoulders, warm golden sunrise glow, slightly overexposed sun near the horizon, translucent edges on the white shirt, soft reflected light from sand and sea, bright yet gentle early morning atmosphere. Style: hyper-realistic photography, cinematic but natural, 35mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, subtle wet texture on fabric and skin, soft warm color grading, lifelike anatomy, clean and refined summer beach mood.
